title: See you soon, TID
body: http://es.youtube.com/watch?v=Be6jlCuMvVQ *This song inspired me to write this post (listen to it while you read, if you can).* It’s been over a year now since executives from [Telefónica I+D](http://www.tid.es) (TID) Barcelona. At the time, I was at [Vueling](http://www.vueling.com), where the crisis had been in the air for a while, and I saw TID’s offer as a chance to work closer to home again on a very interesting project: creating *[mockups](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mockup)* (models and prototypes) for social media. The hiring process was quick, but it took months to start due to Telefonica’s bureaucracy, and in the end, we decided I would join through a contractor. Over the past 8 months, I’ve worked on several projects. The [design, layout, and creation of *mockups* or prototypes](http://www.xarop.com/category/diseno-web/) for websites based on [social media](http://www.xarop.com/category/redes-sociales/) has been my primary task.  Few of these projects have [seen the light of day](http://www.tribuiphone.com "This one did!"), but thanks to this work, I’ve continued to learn every day. Due to the economic crisis and cost-cutting measures, this has come to an end;  in principle, it’s a temporary hiatus—I hope this isn’t a permanent goodbye—but that doesn’t mean I’d like to use this platform to “say goodbye” to my colleagues and bosses.  You won’t see me physically at  my workplace anymore,  but I’m convinced that [we’ll meet online](http://www.xarop.com/my-activity/),  and I’m sure I’ll cross paths with some of you on a project in the future. I’d also like to thank my company, [Entel](http://www.entel.es/), and specifically HR for helping me find a new job despite such short notice. And that’s it—I just need to promote myself a little. I’ll probably continue freelancing; if anyone needs help with [design,  layout, and  mockup creation](http://www.xarop.com/category/diseno-web/), you know [where to find me](http://www.xarop.com/contact/). And if you want to leave me a [comment here](#comments), to cheer me up, offer me work, or whatever.  Thanks. See you soon, TID
